hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eq '(^|[^a-zA-Z0-9_/.-])\.levers\.yml([^a-zA-Z0-9_/.-]|$)' && ! printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[[:space:]])levers[[:space:]]+(get|merge-strictest|validate|audit|set|init|add-package|detect-packages|list-enums)'; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Use `levers get [<key>] --at <path>` (omit the key for the full merged view) to read the effective value. Reading .levers.yml directly skips inheritance resolution between root and package files."}}'; fi

path=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if printf '%s' "$path" | grep -Eq '(^|/)\.levers\.yml$'; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Use `levers get [<key>] --at <path>` (omit the key for the full merged view) to read the effective value. Reading .levers.yml directly skips inheritance resolution between root and package files."}}'; fi
